measurement_window: Verify the next runner produces a truthful lane or a changed blocker/fingerprint state.
summary: Existing architecture repair is still current.

structural_capability.name: execution_board_follow_through_runner
structural_capability.why_new: Creates a dedicated runtime that turns the execution board into the next actionable lane instead of letting system-design repairs stop at packet refreshes or queue housekeeping.

fake_green_guard: This runner only counts if it refreshes the consolidated execution board and either advances one of its executable lanes or explicitly records that no truthful do-now lane exists yet.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: consolidated do-now assets across all non-Reddit lanes
